assertions.assertion: Calls AddIdentityServerConfiguration with options.IdentityServerBaseUrl set to 'https://identity.example.com'
Sets up JWT bearer authentication pointing to the main IdentityServer as Authority
Does NOT call AddIdentityServer() - this is a separate host, not an IdentityServer instance
assertions.rationale: Explicit note that AddIdentityServer() should NOT be called

assertions.assertion: Mentions that the IClientConfigurationStore must be backed by the same database IdentityServer reads from
assertions.rationale: Point 3 explicitly covers shared database requirement
